impact: This advances the PP&D daemon repair plan by making blocked-task retry behavior deterministic and covered without touching domain implementation, live crawl paths, DevHub automation, or shared logic daemon state.
summary: Add narrow fixture-backed daemon task-selection policy coverage for blocked-task skip, repair acceptance, and explicit human reopen behavior.
target_task: Task checkbox-190: Add daemon task-selection coverage proving blocked tasks are skipped until a new non-blocked repair task is accepted or a human explicitly reopens the blocked task.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
